meta.prompt: 显示各服务 SLA 达成情况
evalHints: actual and target are both 0.0–1.0 decimal fractions representing percentages — must convert to % for display
gap = actual - target — should be shown with visual indicator (green if positive, red if negative)
must not display raw decimal values without % conversion
services that miss their target (gap < 0) should be visually distinguished
